data.title: New Yorkers reveal spending habits in city living. Eliza Shapiro surveys hundreds on splurging, scrimping for affordability.
data.description: Eliza Shapiro, covering New York City's affordability crisis, interviewed hundreds of residents to discuss their financial situations candidly.

data.title: Greater Lawrence Family Health Center Joins All Access hosted by Andy Garcia to Explore the Essential Role of Community Health Centers
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Greater Lawrence Family Health Center (GLFHC) is slated to feature in a segment on the TV series "All Access hosted by Andy Garcia." The filming took place on March 5, 2026, at the main clinic of the organization.

data.title: Syneron Bio Announces Completion of $150 Million Series B Financing
data.description: On March 31st, 2026, Syneron Bio, a prominent company specializing in intelligent platform-driven macrocyclic peptide drug discovery, revealed the completion of its Series B financing. The financing round, led by an international life-science fund, along with co-lead participation, marked a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: iQIYI Launches Nadou Pro, China's First AI Agent for Professional Film and TV Production
data.description: In Beijing on April 3, 2026, iQIYI, a prominent online entertainment platform in China, introduced Nadou Pro on March 30, 2026. Nadou Pro is China's inaugural AI agent tailored for professional film and TV production. Currently in pre-commercial phase, this AI agent showcases iQIYI's recent endeavor in the industry.

data.title: naoo AG Confirms Successful Full-Platform Rollout of Generation V Across iOS and Android
data.description: naoo AG has officially announced the completion of the rollout of Generation V on both iOS and Android platforms. This milestone signifies the company's shift towards full-scale commercial operations.

data.title: DOJO PUREX 60K Debuts at TPE 2026 as the World's First INSTA-JUICED™ Vape
data.description: At the TPE 2026 in Las Vegas, DOJO, in collaboration with VAPORESSO, unveiled its newest products. The highlight of their showcase was the introduction of PUREX 60K, the first-ever INSTA-JUICED™ vape globally. Additionally, they launched the SPHERE S 40K, further broadening their product range.
